title: clinopodium menthifolium subsp. hirtum
intro: Clinopodium menthifolium subsp. hirtum, also known as Calamintha hirta, is a plant species within the mint family, Lamiaceae. This herb is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic agent, which helps in soothing digestive issues and reducing pain. The health benefits of Clinopodium menthifolium subsp. hirtum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and irritable bowel syndrome, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. Clinopodium menthifolium subsp. hirtum can be prepared into teas, tinctures, and infusions for its medicinal uses, with its leaves often being used fresh or dried for various herbal applications.
